title: Thunderbird stopped working Android 16
creator: perry13
content: Pixel 8a, 256GB/120GB free, Android 16, Thunderbird v16.1 Thunderbird stopped sending and receiving emails after several months. My storage is not full. I also deleted messages to be sure. I checked my android settings as indictated in the troubleshooting guides and have been unable to resolve problem. I have it set to automatically download emails. Manually checking emails by using the "refresh" button does not work either.

title: (reliably) crashes on Android 8 when fetching/containing images
creator: bruno.freitag
content:
I use K9mail on multiple devices since eternity. Since the latest update it crashes on an old Galaxy S10 / Android 8 when fetching images (show remote images) or, it looks like, when the message has images.

It crashes on 80% of mails with image. I can provide you with messages that reliably crash (e.g. newspaper newsletter from nzz.ch) and with only one that works (newspaper newsletter from 20minutes.ch) Plain text and plain HTML text messages seem to work fine.

it works fine on all other [android 12+] devices Re-install the current version did not help re-installing an older version from FDROID worked

Help is apprechiated
